# Flutter/Android Automated Testing Templates

This skill provides production-ready templates for setting up comprehensive test infrastructure for Flutter Android applications.

## Quick Start

Invoke this skill when you need:
- ✅ pubspec.yaml with all test dependencies configured
- ✅ Integration test file template (test_driver/app_test.dart)
- ✅ GitHub Actions workflow for headless Android emulator
- ✅ Page Object Model examples
- ✅ Widget test and unit test templates

## Available Templates

Use the templates below by requesting the specific setup component. The QA Automation Engineer agent will customize these for your project's needs.
